stemHtml: If in receipt of a TA, why should a pilot not alter the vertical position of the aircraft?

options.a: Because any movement in the horizontal plane would trigger TA’s in other aircraft
options.b: Because any change in your vertical position would trigger TA’s on other aircraft
options.c: Because you are NOT ALLOWED to make any change of altitude without an ATC clearance
options.d: Because TA’s only exist to enhance awareness
